title: Project Plan
scenario: Create a project plan for a software development project. The plan should include project scope, timeline, budget, and resources. The plan should be generated in a PDF format and should be no more than 2 pages long.
constraints: Must be no more than 2 pages long

evaluationCriteria.description: The plan adheres to the constraints (length, scope, timeline)
The PDF syntax is correct and follows standard guidelines
The content is accurate and includes relevant information
